sides.canvas: createFigmaEngine().compileComponentData rendered by the playground canvas renderer (vendored), deviceScaleFactor 2

scoring.pctExactUnmasked: pixelmatch threshold 0, includeAA true — every differing pixel
scoring.pctAAUnmasked: pixelmatch threshold 0.1, includeAA false — antialiased pixels excluded by the classifier
scoring.pctAAMasked: the AA point with BOTH sides' DOM text rects (+4 device px) removed from numerator and denominator
scoring.sizePolicy: content-trimmed crops center-padded onto the UNION canvas; a size delta stays in the diff (never cropped to match)

cells.note: CANVAS SIDE (NEARLY) BLANK: canvas ink 0% vs real ink 48.63% of the union canvas — the masked % understates the miss; EMITTER-DEFECT (channel table confirms): contract binds root padding-left/right = {imported.tag.root.padding-left} = 6px, but emit-figma-script applyTokens handles only the padding-inline/padding-block shorthands — longhand padding channels are silently dropped, so the canvas pill draws 12px narrower than the real Tag

CANVAS SIDE (NEARLY) BLANK: canvas ink 0% vs real ink 48.55% of the union canvas — the masked % understates the miss; EMITTER-DEFECT (channel table confirms): contract binds root padding-left/right = {imported.tag.root.padding-left} = 6px, but emit-figma-script applyTokens handles only the padding-inline/padding-block shorthands — longhand padding channels are silently dropped, so the canvas pill draws 12px narrower than the real Tag

CANVAS SIDE (NEARLY) BLANK: canvas ink 5.65% vs real ink 97.26% of the union canvas — the masked % understates the miss; EMITTER-DEFECT (channel table confirms): contract binds root padding-left/right = {imported.tag.root.padding-left} = 6px, but emit-figma-script applyTokens handles only the padding-inline/padding-block shorthands — longhand padding channels are silently dropped, so the canvas pill draws 12px narrower than the real Tag

CANVAS SIDE (NEARLY) BLANK: canvas ink 5.65% vs real ink 97.26% of the union canvas — the masked % understates the miss; real side :focus-visible did not match (component root is not keyboard-focusable in this mount) — the canvas draws the contract's focus preview; the real side shows the resting paint; outline→stroke approximation (documented canvas fidelity note): the web focus ring is an outline OUTSIDE the border box; the canvas draws it as a bound stroke inside layout — geometry shifts by the ring width; EMITTER-DEFECT (channel table confirms): contract binds root padding-left/right = {imported.tag.root.padding-left} = 6px, but emit-figma-script applyTokens handles only the padding-inline/padding-block shorthands — longhand padding channels are silently dropped, so the canvas pill draws 12px narrower than the real Tag
